input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.8.2.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.8.2.1
            TITLE: the charger must be galvanically isolated (ac) input to (dc) output.

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.8.2.1: The Charger must be galvanically isolated (AC) input to (DC) output.
EV.8.2.1 The Charger must be galvanically isolated (AC) input to (DC) output.

final_answer: The Charger must be galvanically isolated (AC) input to (DC) output.
